name: Butler Park
description: Recently resurfaced in May 2024 to include 3- permanent Pickleball Courts, and 1 -Tennis court with Pickleball lines and painted kitchen.  Courts are surfaced with Picklemaster by Sportmaster Acrylic over top of Asphalt.  Court resurfacing brought to you by partnership of the local Pickleball Club and the City of Hot Springs.   No official scheduled play times.

name: Mueller Center
description: Tiled hard floor is lined for Pickleball where nets are set up on the day of play.  Access the local Pickleball Clubs facebook page for weekly announcements for Mueller Center Open Gym.
